139 D0500A2_STF_INTRSTLOSS_FREQ_CD D0500A2_STF_INTRSTLOSS_FREQ_CD D0500A2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Interest Loss Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident has experienced a loss of interest or pleasure in doing things. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip
